---
title: "Our Team"
title-block-style: none
description: "Meet the team behind chen.ist — cybersecurity experts, digital infrastructure specialists, and open-source advocates based in Europe."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:70vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Our Team</h1>
    <p>European expertise in cybersecurity, digital infrastructure, and open-source technology.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOUNDER -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Alin Mechenici — Founder & CEO"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Alin Mechenici</h2>
        <p style="color:var(--c); font-weight:600; font-size:0.85rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:1.25rem;">Founder & CEO</p>
        <p>Cybersecurity expert with over 15 years of experience securing digital infrastructure across Europe. Based in Romania, Alin leads chen.ist with a focus on European digital sovereignty, open-source solutions, and practical security that works for real organizations.</p>
        <p>His approach combines deep technical expertise in blue team operations and threat hunting with strategic consulting for NIS2 compliance, cloud architecture, and digital resilience.</p>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; margin-top:1.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <a href="/alinmechenici/" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> Full profile</a>
          <a href="/alinmechenici/events/" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-calendar3-event"></i> Events & speaking</a>
          <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/alinmechenici" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/alinmechenici" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="m-lk"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EXPERTISE -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Our Expertise</h2>
    <p class="sub">Deep technical skills across six core domains.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i><h3>Cybersecurity</h3><p>Blue team operations, SOC design and management, threat hunting, incident response, and vulnerability assessments.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-hdd-network"></i><h3>Digital Infrastructure</h3><p>NixOS and OpenBSD hardened systems, Nextcloud deployments, self-hosted platforms, and infrastructure automation.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i><h3>Cloud</h3><p>Architecture, migration, and optimization across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform with security-first design.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i><h3>Education</h3><p>Academy programs, hands-on trainings, microlearning modules, and cybersecurity awareness for technical and non-technical teams.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i><h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3><p>Full-scope NIS2 assessments, gap analysis, CISO as a Service, and compliance roadmaps for essential and important entities.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Open Source</h3><p>Contributing to and building on open-source technologies. Transparent, auditable, and community-driven solutions.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EUROPEAN ROOTS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-meeting.webp" alt="European operations"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>European roots,<br>global expertise.</h2>
        <p>Headquartered in Craiova, Romania, with operations in Bucharest and partner networks in Stockholm. We serve organizations across the European Union with a deep understanding of the regulatory, cultural, and technical landscape that defines European digital infrastructure.</p>
        <p>Our position in Romania gives us a unique advantage: access to exceptional technical talent, proximity to EU institutions, and the pragmatism of building solutions that work within European frameworks from day one.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Work with us</h2>
    <p>Ready to strengthen your digital infrastructure and security posture? Let's talk.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free initial call &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> No obligation &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> European expertise
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
